Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model

Class ProveedorAyuda

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda
public class ProveedorAyuda extends Object
Provides hints for empty cells of a Sudoku board.

Given the current state of the board, this class finds an empty cell and proposes a valid number for it. The validity of the suggestion is delegated to a ValidadorSudoku, ensuring that the hint never breaks the row, column or block rules at the moment it is requested.

The provider does NOT solve the entire board. It only suggests a single value for a single empty cell, leaving the puzzle for the player to finish. This satisfies user story HU-4 of the project.

Hints are unlimited: every call to sugerirAyuda() produces a new suggestion based on the current board state.

This class belongs to the model layer of the MVC architecture and is independent of any UI framework.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProveedorAyuda

      public ProveedorAyuda(TableroSudoku tablero)
      Constructs a new hint provider bound to a specific board.
      Parameters:
      tablero - the board on which hints will be suggested
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board is null

  • Method Details

    • sugerirAyuda

      public ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia sugerirAyuda()
      Generates a hint for an empty cell of the board.

      The method picks a random empty cell, then collects every legal value (1 to 6) for that cell at the current board state, and finally returns one of those valid values chosen at random.

      Returns:
      a ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia describing the suggested cell and value, or null if no hint can be provided (either because the board has no empty cells or because the only empty cells have no valid candidates)

    • obtenerCeldasVacias

      private List<Celda> obtenerCeldasVacias()
      Collects every cell of the board that is currently empty.
      Returns:
      a list of empty cells; never null

    • obtenerCandidatosValidos

      private List<Integer> obtenerCandidatosValidos(Celda celda)
      Computes the list of values from 1 to 6 that can be legally placed in the given cell according to the current board state.
      Parameters:
      celda - the empty cell to analyze
      Returns:
      a list of candidate values; may be empty if no number fits
